---
title: "Eva's #30DayChartChallenge Gallery"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## #30DayChartChallenge

#30DayChartChallenge is a global, community-driven data visualization initiative taking place annually in April. Everyone is invited to create and share one chart per day for 30 days, each based on a different prompt.
:::

```{r}
#| label: session-setup

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```


```{r}
#| label: custom-functions

#' CleanPromptsMd
#' @param prompts_path - a character vector - path to a md file with categories and prompts per day as obtained from the official challenge repo
#' @returns A data frame with category and prompt and path to the produced plot for each day which was worked on

CleanPromptsMd <- function(prompts_path) {
  prompts <- read.delim(prompts_path, header = T, col.names = "prompt")
  
  # Remove markdown styling characters
  prompts <- prompts |>
    mutate(prompt = gsub("  |[\\]|[*]", "", prompt))

  # Isolate category amd prompt into separate columns
  prompts <- prompts |>
    mutate(
      prompt_day = as.numeric(gsub(". ", "", str_extract(string = prompt, pattern = "^\\d+. "))),
      category = case_when(
        is.na(prompt_day) ~ gsub(" ", "", prompt),
        TRUE ~ NA
      ),
      prompt = str_to_sentence(gsub("\\d+. ", "", prompt))
    ) |>
    fill(category, .direction = "down") |>
    filter_out(is.na(prompt_day))
  
  return(prompts)
}

#' DisplayPlots
#' @param df_plots - a data frame with columns category, prompt and path as obtained with the CleanPromptsMd() function
#' @returns A quarto syntax to display plots sorted by category and in a two-column layout.
#' Use in a code chunk with option `results: asis`

DisplayPlots <- function(df_plots) {
  for (ctg in categories) {
    ctg_plots <- filter(df_plots, category == ctg)

    cat(paste0(sprintf("## %s", ctg)), "\n\n")

    cat("::: {.columns layout-ncol=2}\n\n")

    for (d in ctg_plots$prompt_day) {
      pprompt <- ctg_plots[ctg_plots$prompt_day == d, ]$prompt
      path <- ctg_plots[ctg_plots$prompt_day == d, ]$path

      cat(
        sprintf(
          '![Day %s: %s](%s){margin="50px 50px 50px 50px"}\n\n',
          d,
          pprompt,
          path
        )
      )
    }

    cat(":::\n\n")
  }
}
```


# 2026

```{r}
#| label: extract-prompts-2026

prompts <- CleanPromptsMd(prompts_path = "../2026/2026-list_prompts.md")
```


```{r}
#| label: identify-prompts-with-plots-2026

plot_files <- list.files("../2026/plots/", pattern = "png", full.names = T)

df_plots <- data.frame(
  "path" = plot_files,
  "prompt_day" = as.numeric(str_extract(string = basename(plot_files), pattern = "^\\d+"))
) |> 
  left_join(prompts, by = "prompt_day")

df_plots <- df_plots |> 
  filter_out(grepl("exclude.png",  path))

# Categories with plots
categories <- unique(df_plots$category)
```


```{r}
#| label: display-2026
#| results: asis

DisplayPlots(df_plots)
```

**Resources**



# 2025

```{r}
#| label: extract-prompts-2025

prompts <- CleanPromptsMd("../2025/2025-list_prompts.md")
```


```{r}
#| label: identify-prompts-with-plots-2025

plot_files <- list.files("../2025/plots/", pattern = "png", full.names = T)

df_plots <- data.frame(
  "path" = plot_files,
  "prompt_day" = as.numeric(str_extract(string = basename(plot_files), pattern = "^\\d+"))
) |> 
  left_join(prompts, by = "prompt_day")

df_plots <- df_plots |> 
  filter_out(grepl("exclude.png",  path))

# Categories with plots
categories <- unique(df_plots$category)
```


```{r}
#| label: display-2025
#| results: asis

DisplayPlots(df_plots)
```

**Resources**
